/usr/bin/g++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ToliticaAssistant.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/ToliticaAssistant.dir/ToliticaAssistant_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ToliticaAssistant.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ToliticaAssistant.dir/widget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ToliticaAssistant.dir/ToliticaAssistant_autogen/EWIEGA46WW/qrc_visualElements.cpp.o -o ToliticaAssistant  /usr/lib/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.16 /usr/lib/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.16 /usr/lib/libQt5Core.so.5.15.16
